skills.name: get-company-info
skills.description: Returns Greenberry contact details, address, hours, and service areas.

skills.name: list-services
skills.description: Lists website, IT support, SEO, and email services offered by Greenberry.

skills.name: list-suites
skills.description: Lists Greenberry website suites: Parish, Club, School, and Business sites.

skills.name: view-portfolio
skills.description: Browse past Greenberry projects and case studies.

skills.name: submit-contact-request
skills.description: Submit a contact request to Greenberry. Requires a Cloudflare Turnstile token; human-only by design.

skills.name: subscribe-newsletter
skills.description: Subscribe an email address to the Greenberry newsletter. Requires a Cloudflare Turnstile token.
